news.t: Bond ETF flows this year just topped annual record set in 2021
ETF investors flee cash-like government bond funds, favor riskier assets in ‘bullish buying'
Here are some ETFs State Street likes with recession worries, Fed rate hikes in focus
Your 2021 Guide To High-Yield Dividend Funds
7 Actively Managed ETFs to Buy for an Edge

overview.description: The State Street DoubleLine Total Return Tactical ETF (TOTL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed, long-only bond fund that invests in a wide array of fixed income instruments of any maturity and credit quality. TOTL was launched on Feb 23, 2015 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: Bond ETF flows this year just topped annual record set in 2021
data.text: Investors are flocking to bond ETFs this year, according to State Street.
